query:
-- Confirm no more duplicates
SELECT participantId, dailyLogId, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM payment_events WHERE dailyLogId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY participantId, dailyLogId HAVING cnt > 1;

-- Count legitimate penalty events per participant
SELECT p.id, p.displayName, p.livesRemaining,
  COUNT(pe.id) AS penaltyCount,
  4 - COUNT(pe.id) AS correctLives
FROM participants p
LEFT JOIN payment_events pe ON pe.participantId = p.id AND pe.dailyLogId IS NOT NULL AND pe.status != 'waived'
GROUP BY p.id, p.displayName, p.livesRemaining
ORDER BY p.id;
